response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all mandatory for this role. His experience is overwhelmingly in web, mobile, and cloud stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with no embedded firmware or switch product background.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to work in high-performance, distributed systems
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX firmware contexts
Zero experience with LAN-switch security protocols or embedded networking
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: Absence of Linux Kernel or Switch Chip Knowledge
